summary_text: Thesis: In medical AI, adoption should start with auditability and shared context, not model size, because trust comes from traceable decisions and clinically usable memory. - Bigger models do not fix missing provenance. - Shared context reduces handoff loss and silent drift. - Audit trails make human judgment reviewable, accountable, and safer to scale. consulted_worldview_source: /Users/masayuki/.claude/docs/philosophy.md used_obsidian_for_worldview: no worldview_contract_applied: true
